subject: Auto Update Snap button spec (React + backend) — Phase 4 of snap-auto-update pipeline
purpose: Operator hard-canonical 2026-05-24T20:14Z: 'link this to snap panel too but yea add like a auto update snap buttton or sum like that'. Panel needs UI affordance for operator-on-demand Snap version refresh + per-device deploy + smoke + rollback. Composes with snap-auto-update design.md (Phase 4) and kernel-apk-owned acquire.py + smoke_test.py + rollback.py (shipped this turn under tools/snap-update-detector/).

react_component_spec.props_typescript: interface AutoUpdateSnapPanelProps { devices: PhoneDevice[]; currentSnapVersion: string; latestSnapVersion: string; onJobStart: (jobId: string) => void; }
react_component_spec.state_typescript: interface State { selectedSerials: Set<string>; smokeTest: boolean; rollbackOnFailure: boolean; targetVersion: string; jobId?: string; jobStatus?: 'queued'|'running'|'success'|'partial'|'failed'; perDeviceResult?: Record<string, PerDeviceResult>; }
render_structure: VersionDeltaCard: shows current vs latest (color: green=match, amber=behind, red=blocked)
DeviceMultiSelect: checkbox list of devices.phones[] with selected_serials state
OptionsRow: 2 toggles (smoke_test default ON, rollback_on_failure default ON) + target_version input (default 'latest')
PrimaryButton 'Auto Update Snap' (disabled if no devices selected; loading spinner during job)
ProgressTimeline: when jobStatus != null, render Phase 1/2/3/4/5 progress per device
ResultBanner: when jobStatus in success/partial/failed, summary + per-device drill-down
interactions: On click PrimaryButton: POST /api/snap/auto-update -> save jobId in state -> poll GET /api/snap/auto-update/{jobId} every 3s until terminal status
Error: show inline banner with retry button

primary.request_body_shape_typescript: interface Req { target_version: string|'latest'; device_serials: string[]; smoke_test: boolean; rollback_on_failure: boolean; }
primary.response_shape_typescript: interface Resp { ok: true; job_id: string; queued_devices: string[]; } | { ok: false; error: string; code: 'INVALID_VERSION'|'NO_DEVICES'|'ALREADY_RUNNING'|'INTERNAL'; }
processing_flow: 1) Validate target_version (resolve 'latest' via tools/snap-update-detector/poll.ps1 state JSON)
6) Worker iterates device_serials: smoke_test.py (Phase 3); on fail and rollback_on_failure, call rollback.py (Phase 5)
7) Persist per-device results to job state

job_status.response_shape_typescript: interface JobResp { ok: bool; job_id: string; status: 'queued'|'running'|'success'|'partial'|'failed'; phase?: 1|2|3|4|5; per_device: Record<string, { phase: number; ok: bool; version_installed?: string; error?: string; rolled_back?: bool }>; created_at: string; updated_at: string; }

version_state.response_shape_typescript: interface VersionState { current_installed: Record<string, string>; latest_available: string; last_polled_utc: string; }

manual_rollback.response_shape_typescript: interface RollbackResp { ok: bool; from_version: string; to_version: string; verified: bool; }

error_codes.404: Device not found OR job_id not found
error_codes.409: Conflict (job already running for one or more devices)
error_codes.422: Unprocessable (target_version not found in APK cache and no internet to fetch)

dependencies_on_kernel_apk_shipped_this_.acquire_py: tools/snap-update-detector/acquire.py (compile+help+dry-run PASS) — Phase 1 invoked by backend worker
dependencies_on_kernel_apk_shipped_this_.all_three: Shared JSON contract on stdout (single-line {ok, phase, ...}); shared exit codes (0/1/2/3); cache under ~/.sinister/snap-apk-cache/

verification_path_for_panel: Mock backend POST returns 202 + job_id -> assert React component transitions to status=queued
Mock GET /jobs returns status=running -> assert ProgressTimeline renders
Mock GET /jobs returns status=success -> assert ResultBanner renders with per-device breakdown
Mock GET /jobs returns status=partial with one device rolled_back:true -> assert manual-rollback button hidden for that device
Mock POST /rollback returns ok:true -> assert UI updates
not_in_scope: Frida hook re-extraction (snap-emulator-api lane owns Phase 2 per 2026-05-25T0630Z inbox)
Account state recovery post-rollback (separate kernel-apk concern)
ui_inheritance_directive_from_operator: Operator hard-canonical 2026-05-24T15:44Z: 'everything that makes a ui needs to base off our dsahboard skeleton ... each time we make a dahsbaord and such we need to expand on that'. Panel MUST inherit from projects/sinister-dashboard-skeleton/. If any primitive (e.g. VersionDeltaCard, ProgressTimeline) is missing from skeleton: ADD to skeleton FIRST (commit there, update PATTERNS.md), then consume. NEVER fork one-off components.
